text:
There once was a lonely mouse who lived in a large house all alone. Every day he would go outside and watch the birds fly around.

One day his mouse friend moved in next door. The new friend was interesting to watch. He could dance everywhere. When he talked, everyone would listen. Everyone found out how much he loved flowers. After all rainbows are just a few cloudy days.

The mouse made friends with the flowers. "Oh, you're so nice!" said the flowers. "We're so humble. We just sit there day after day."

One day, the flowers heard rustling noise at the edge of town. They said to each other, "There's some danger there."

The mouse told the flowers all about it. The flowers were excited. "Oh, we'll go!" said the flowers.

One day the flowers went back there. They went to sit at the edge, talking the whole time. They got thirsty. They drank as much water as they could think
